scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.validate: npm run lint:functions && npm run test:web && npm run test:rules && npm run build
scripts.emulators: npm --prefix functions run build && firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions
scripts.emulators:export: npm --prefix functions run build && firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions --export-on-exit=./.firebase-emulator-data
